items_flat.title_en: Meta unveils the agentic Muse Image generator
items_flat.title_zh: Meta 發表具代理能力的 Muse Image 圖像生成器
items_flat.summary_en: Muse Image reasons over a request, can gather context, and plans before generation; Meta began rolling it into its AI consumer experiences.
items_flat.summary_zh: Muse Image 會先理解需求、蒐集脈絡並規劃後再生成；Meta 開始把它導入旗下 AI 消費者體驗。

items_flat.title_en: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web beta
items_flat.title_zh: Claude Cowork 擴展至手機與網頁 Beta
items_flat.summary_en: Anthropic announced cross-device Cowork access so long-running tasks can start on desktop and be checked from a phone, beginning with Max users.
items_flat.summary_zh: Anthropic 宣布 Cowork 跨裝置功能，讓長時間任務可從桌面啟動、再由手機查看，首波自 Max 用戶開始。

anthropic.title_en: Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web beta
anthropic.title_zh: Claude Cowork 擴展至手機與網頁 Beta
anthropic.summary_en: Anthropic announced cross-device Cowork access so long-running tasks can start on desktop and be checked from a phone, beginning with Max users.
